prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022-2025年理科/物理类最低位次分别约为18800、19800、18600、30100名。2025年因四川首次实施新高考（物理类），位次出现结构性跳升至约30100名，较往 年明显后移，2025年基准位次约30100名；该校在四川理科/物理类招生计划：2022年33人、2023年38人、2024年41人、2025年40人、2026年36人。2026年 较2025年缩招4人（-10%），计划减少使竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第70名，近年排名稳定在64-70区间，属中上游2 11院校；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及文学院副教授贾浅浅论文抄袭举报事件，学校已成立工作专班启动调查，反应较为迅速；抖音热度排名第81位，评价 为一般，整体关注度不高；第五轮学科评估中，地质学获评A、考古学获评A、软件工程获评A-，均为该校王牌学科；考古学、历史学等文科专业实力突出，对相 关方向考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校开设的电子信息类、计算机类、临床医学等专业属当前高热推荐方向；四川2026年高考总人数约53.5万，较2025年（约46 .3万）增长约15.6%，考生规模显著扩大，竞争加剧；西北大学位于陕西西安，属西北地区综合性大学，对四川考生有一定地域 吸引力；该校在四川招生人数占比较小，2025年物理类计划40人，属外省招生规模适中。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年新高考首年位次跳升后的基准、2026年缩招10%的缓解效应 、四川考生总数大幅增长带来的竞争加剧、以及声誉偏负面的轻微影响，预计2026年物理类最低位次在28301基础上小幅后移。预测最低位次约28600名，区间28100-29100名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were approximately 18800, 19800, 18600, and 30100 respectively. In 2025, due to Sichuan's first implementation of the new college entrance examination (Physics Category), the ranking experienced a structural jump to about 30100, significantly shifting backward compared to previous years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 30100. The university's enrollment plans for Science/Physics Category in Sichuan: 33 in 2022, 38 in 2023, 41 in 2024, 40 in 2025, and 36 in 2026. Compared to 2025, 2026 sees a reduction of 4 students (-10%), which slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 70th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in the 64-70 range in recent years, placing it among mid-to-upper tier 211 institutions. In 2026, its reputation is slightly negative, mainly due to a plagiarism accusation against Associate Professor Jia Qianqian from the School of Literature. The university has established a special task force and initiated an investigation, responding relatively promptly. Its Douyin popularity ranks 81st, with average evaluation and overall low attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Geology received an A, Archaeology an A, and Software Engineering an A-, all being flagship disciplines. Archaeology, History, and other liberal arts disciplines are particularly strong, attracting candidates interested in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university offers majors such as Electronic Information, Computer Science, and Clinical Medicine, which are currently highly recommended. In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam takers in Sichuan is approximately 535,000, an increase of about 15.6% from 2025 (approximately 463,000), significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition. Northwest University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, a comprehensive university in the northwest region, with some regional appeal to Sichuan candidates. The university's enrollment in Sichuan is relatively small, with 40 Physics Category spots in 2025, representing a moderate scale for an out-of-province institution.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline after the ranking jump in the first year of the new exam in 2025, the mitigating effect of a 10% enrollment reduction in 2026, the intensified competition due to a significant increase in Sichuan's total candidate numbers, and the slight negative impact of reputation, the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is expected to shift slightly backward from 28301. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 28600, with a range of 28100-29100.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)

- Electronic Information (including Communication Engineering, Electronic Information Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology, etc.)
- Chemistry (National Top-Notch Student Training Base)
- Physics (including Applied Physics, Materials Physics, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering)
- Mathematics and Applied Mathematics (Xiong Qinglai Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)

- Process Equipment and Control Engineering (Chemical Intelligent Control Direction)
- Cultural Heritage Preservation Technology (Taibai Campus)
- Geology (National Top-Notch Student Training Base)
- Chemical and Pharmaceutical (including Chemical Engineering and Technology, Pharmaceutical Engineering, Energy Chemical Engineering)
- Bioengineering
- Food Science and Engineering (Taibai Campus)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Economics (Taibai Campus) (Mathematical Economics Experimental Class)
- Urban and Rural Planning (National Land Spatial Planning Direction)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 28600, range 28100-29100. Candidates with rankings within 28100 are advised to focus on Tier 1 majors such as Clinical Medicine and Electronic Information. Candidates around ranking 28600 should primarily consider Tier 2 majors, prioritizing advantageous disciplines like Geology (National Top-Notch Base, A-level discipline) and Cultural Heritage Preservation Technology (related to A-level Archaeology). Candidates near ranking 29100 may consider Tier 3 majors as safety options, while also watching for potential admission opportunities in less popular Tier 2 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 3230, 4600, 7370, and 5730 respectively. In 2024, the drama, film and television literature major lowered the school line to 7370; in 2025, the first year of the new college entrance examination, it recovered to 5730. The overall fluctuation in the past 3 years has been significant, with a baseline of about 5730 in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Sichuan's liberal arts/history category: 22 in 2022, 18 in 2023, 16 in 2024, 12 in 2025, and 12 in 2026. The 2026 plan is the same as 2025, but shows a continuous reduction trend compared to 2022-2024.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 70th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. The reputation evaluation in 2026 is somewhat negative, mainly involving the plagiarism incident of Jia Qianqian from the School of Literature, which the university has initiated an investigation into. Douyin popularity ranking is 81st, with average reviews and overall low attention. Archaeology was rated A (fifth round), at the national top level. History (Base Class) is strongly related to archaeology. Chinese Language and Literature, Journalism and Communication, and other liberal arts majors also have strong disciplinary support.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language and Literature are socially popular and recommended. The total number of Sichuan college entrance examination takers in 2026 is about 535,000, with an estimated 206,000 in the history category, an increase of about 15.7% compared to 2025 (about 178,000), leading to intensified competition. Northwest University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, a comprehensive university in the northwest region. Its archaeology, history, and other liberal arts majors enjoy a high reputation nationwide, strongly attracting Sichuan candidates interested in literature and history.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking from the first year of the new college entrance examination in 2025, the unchanged enrollment plan in 2026, the significant increase in the total number of history category candidates in Sichuan, and the slight negative impact of reputation, it is expected that the minimum ranking for the history category in 2026 will slightly shift backward from 5735. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 5785, with a range of 5285-6285.

Candidates with rankings within 5285 can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors such as Archaeology (A-level discipline) and Law (International Legal Experimental Class). Candidates with rankings around 5785 should mainly consider Tier 2, prioritizing recommended directions like Chinese Language and Literature. Candidates with rankings near 6285 can consider Tier 3's Drama, Film and Television Literature as a safety option. Archaeology, as Northwest University's flagship discipline (A-level), is an excellent choice for candidates with ranking advantages.
